info.title: ListBee
info.summary: Commerce API for AI agents and automation.
info.description:
Commerce infrastructure for AI agents and automation. Create a listing, collect payment, deliver digital content — or fire a webhook for custom fulfillment.

## New Account (programmatic)
```
POST /v1/bootstrap         {email}           → OTP sent to inbox
POST /v1/bootstrap/verify  {session, code}   → session verified
POST /v1/bootstrap/complete {session}         → {account_id, api_key}
```
Store the `api_key` immediately — it is shown once.

## Existing Account
`Authorization: Bearer lb_...` on all requests.

## Golden Path
1. `POST /v1/account/stripe/connect` → human completes Stripe KYC at returned URL
2. `POST /v1/listings` → create with name + price
3. `PUT /v1/listings/{id}/deliverables` → attach digital content (or skip for webhook fulfillment)
4. `POST /v1/listings/{id}/publish` → returns product page URL

## Readiness
Every resource includes `readiness` with `actions` — check `readiness.next` for what to do. `kind: api` = fixable programmatically. `kind: human` = hand off to the user.

Console (optional): [console.listbee.so](https://console.listbee.so)

get.description: Account status and readiness. Check readiness.operational — if false, readiness.actions lists what's needed. readiness.next is the highest-priority action.

put.description: Update account settings: ga_measurement_id (Google Analytics tracking on checkout pages), notify_orders (email notifications for new orders), and events_callback_url (optional account-level webhook). Returns the updated account with readiness — check readiness.operational to verify the account can accept payments.

delete.description: Permanently delete the authenticated account. PII is anonymized, API keys revoked, webhooks disabled. Order history is retained for accounting. This action is irreversible.

post.description: Revoke the API key in the Authorization header. Use this when an agent detects a credential compromise and must destroy its own authorization without waiting on a human. No rate limit — agents must be able to call this freely under attack. Does not touch any other key on the account.

get.description: List events delivered to this account. Useful for reconciling missed webhook deliveries or auditing order history. Cursor-paginated, newest first. Events are persisted for every order.paid, order.fulfilled, order.refunded, and order.disputed delivery — the payload matches what was sent to agent_callback_url.

parameters.name: type

schema.description: Filter to a single event type (e.g. order.paid).
schema.title: Type

parameters.description: Filter to a single event type (e.g. order.paid).

parameters.name: listing_id

schema.description: Filter to events tied to a specific listing.
schema.title: Listing Id

parameters.description: Filter to events tied to a specific listing.

parameters.name: order_id

schema.description: Filter to events tied to a specific order.
schema.title: Order Id

parameters.description: Filter to events tied to a specific order.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous response.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous response.

post.description: Create a listing to sell digital content. Returns the listing and a one-time `signing_secret` for webhook verification. Store `signing_secret` immediately — subsequent reads only expose the last 4 chars via `signing_secret_preview`. If readiness.sellable is false, follow readiness.actions to resolve. readiness.next is the first action to take. When your account uses a Stripe test key, checkout URLs point to Stripe test mode.

422.description: Validation error (code: `validation_error`). Check `detail` for specifics: price must be positive, slug already exists, deliverable URL unreachable or unsupported format.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after the `Retry-After` header value.

get.description: List all listings for the authenticated account. Filter by status. Cursor-paginated. Returns lightweight summaries — use GET /v1/listings/{listing_id} for full detail including deliverables, readiness, reviews, and checkout schema.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of listings to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of listings to return.

get.description: Get a single listing by ID. Check readiness.sellable — if false, readiness.actions tells you what's needed.

put.description: Update listing fields. Returns updated listing with readiness. To rotate the signing secret, include `signing_secret` in the request body: set to `null` to auto-generate a new secret, or provide a custom string. When rotation occurs, the response object is `listing_with_secret` and includes the full new `signing_secret` once.

delete.description: Delete a listing by ID and its stored content. Irreversible. Published listings with existing orders can still be deleted — order history is preserved but the checkout URL stops working.

post.description: Transition a PUBLISHED listing back to DRAFT. Buyers can no longer reach the product page. Idempotent — calling on a DRAFT listing is a no-op. Returns 409 if the listing is ARCHIVED (terminal state).

409.description: Listing is archived and cannot be unpublished.

post.description: Move a listing to ARCHIVED terminal state. The listing can no longer be published or sold. Idempotent — calling on an already-archived listing is a no-op. Applies to both DRAFT and PUBLISHED listings.
Validate and publish a draft listing. Transitions to published state — the listing becomes live, buyable, and immutable. Fails with 409 and readiness actions if requirements are not met.

get.description: List orders for the authenticated account. Filter by status, listing, and date range. Paginated. Returns lightweight summaries — use GET /v1/orders/{order_id} for full detail including deliverables, readiness, checkout_data, and Stripe payment intent. Order lifecycle: PENDING → PAID → FULFILLED. Terminal: CANCELED, FAILED.

parameters.name: buyer_email

schema.description: Filter by exact buyer email address.
schema.title: Buyer Email

parameters.description: Filter by exact buyer email address.

parameters.name: created_after

schema.description: Only orders created after this ISO 8601 datetime.
schema.title: Created After

parameters.description: Only orders created after this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: created_before

schema.description: Only orders created before this ISO 8601 datetime.
schema.title: Created Before

parameters.description: Only orders created before this ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of orders to return.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of orders to return.

get.description: Get a single order by ID. Order lifecycle: PENDING → PAID → FULFILLED. Check has_deliverables to determine fulfillment mode: if true, content was auto-delivered on payment (order is already FULFILLED). If false, the order stays PAID — call POST /v1/orders/{order_id}/fulfill to deliver content via ListBee, or handle delivery externally via the order.paid webhook. Use readiness.next to determine the recommended next action.

post.description: Issue a full refund for an order. The refund is processed through Stripe on the seller's connected account. Only orders with status `paid` or `fulfilled` can be refunded. If the order is already refunded, returns the order as-is (idempotent). The order transitions to REFUNDED — refund_amount and refunded_at update asynchronously via Stripe webhook. An order.refunded webhook event fires when the refund completes.

422.description: Order cannot be refunded (wrong status or no payment intent).

post.description: Requeue order.paid (and order.fulfilled if applicable) to the listing's agent_callback_url. Uses attempt=1 with no initial delay. Idempotent via Idempotency-Key header. Rate limited: 10/hour/order, 100/hour/api-key. Returns scheduled_attempts=0 if the listing has no agent_callback_url.

Deliver content to the buyer via ListBee. Call this with deliverables after your system generates or prepares content. ListBee creates an access grant, emails the buyer a download link, and transitions the order to FULFILLED. Valid for any order in PAID status. Idempotent: calling on an already-FULFILLED order returns the order unchanged (body ignored, no second email).

409.description: Order is not in PAID status.

get.description: Connectivity check. Returns ok if the API is reachable. No authentication required.

post.description: Start Stripe Connect guided onboarding. Returns a URL to redirect the human to. The human completes Stripe's identity and bank account verification flow. On completion, Stripe fires an account.updated webhook and ListBee marks the account as connected. The stripe_account_id is saved immediately — payment_config is set only after webhook confirmation.

delete.description: Remove Stripe configuration from the account. All published listings become unsellable — checkout URLs return an error until Stripe is reconnected. Call POST /v1/account/stripe/connect to start a new Connect session.

post.description: Step 1 of 2. Send a one-time passcode to the provided email. Returns a bootstrap_token (single-use, 10-min TTL) and a stable account_id for polling. The account is created immediately — account_id is stable across retries and polling. Re-calling with the same email reuses the existing account; only the token is rotated. Public endpoint — no API key required.

Step 2 of 2. Verify the OTP sent in step 1. The bootstrap_token is consumed atomically — cannot be replayed. On success, issues the account's first API key and initiates Stripe Connect onboarding. Returns api_key (store immediately — shown once), stripe_onboarding_url (hand to human), and readiness (agent guidance on next steps). Poll GET /v1/bootstrap/{account_id} until readiness.operational is true. Public endpoint — no API key required.

400.description: Invalid/expired bootstrap token or invalid OTP code

get.description: Poll the account's readiness after bootstrap. Call repeatedly (e.g. every 5s) after handing stripe_onboarding_url to the human. ready becomes true once Stripe Connect onboarding completes and charges are enabled. When ready is true, the account can accept payments. readiness.actions lists remaining steps and readiness.next points to the highest-priority one. Public endpoint — no API key required.
List all available plans with pricing. Public endpoint — no authentication required. Response is cacheable.

operational.title: Operational
operational.description: True when the account can sell. False means actions are needed.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: What's needed to make this account operational. Empty when operational is true.

plan.title: Plan
plan.description: Current plan tier. Values: free (10% fee), pro (0% fee).

fee_rate.title: Fee Rate
fee_rate.description: Transaction fee rate as decimal string. Determined by plan: free=0.10, pro=0.00. Applied as platform fee on each order.

billing_status.title: Billing Status
billing_status.description: Subscription billing status. `active` = payments current. `past_due` = payment failed, service continues during grace period. `unpaid` = grace period expired, listings may be blocked.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Account currency (ISO 4217, lowercase). Set automatically from Stripe Connect. Cannot be changed after connection.

ga_measurement_id.title: Ga Measurement Id
ga_measurement_id.description: Google Analytics 4 Measurement ID (G-XXXXXXXXXX). Set via PUT /v1/account. Injected on all your product pages and thank-you pages

notify_orders.title: Notify Orders
notify_orders.description: Whether seller receives email alerts for new external orders

events_callback_url.title: Events Callback Url
events_callback_url.description: Optional account-level webhook URL for future non-order events

readiness.description: Account operational readiness. `operational` is true when the account can sell. If false, `actions` lists what's needed with kind (api/human), resolve details, and `next` points to the highest-priority action.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Time at which the account was created

code.description: Machine-readable action identifier for automation branching.

kind.description: Whether an agent can execute this directly (api) or needs human interaction (human).

priority.description: Whether this action blocks progress (required) or is an available opportunity (suggested).

message.title: Message
message.description: Human-readable explanation. AI agents relay this to users.
examples: Set Stripe secret key to accept payments

method.title: Method
method.description: How to resolve: HTTP method (POST, GET) for kind=api, 'redirect' for kind=human.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: API endpoint path for kind=api actions.

url.title: Url
url.description: Full URL for kind=human actions (browser redirect).

params.title: Params
params.description: Example request body for kind=api actions.

prefix.title: Prefix
prefix.description: First 8 chars of the raw key (e.g. 'lb_abcd12') — safe to display.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Time at which the key was created.

last_used_at.title: Last Used At
last_used_at.description: Last time this key was used to authenticate a request.

revoked_at.title: Revoked At
revoked_at.description: When the key was revoked. Null if still active.

ready.title: Ready
ready.description: True when the account is fully operational and can accept payments.

readiness.description: Account readiness. When ready is true, actions is empty.

stripe_onboarding_url.title: Stripe Onboarding Url
stripe_onboarding_url.description: Stripe Connect onboarding URL. Non-null until Stripe Connect is complete.

email.title: Email
email.description: Seller email. OTP is sent to this address.

bootstrap_token.title: Bootstrap Token
bootstrap_token.description: Single-use token, pass back in /verify. TTL 10 min.

account_id.title: Account Id
account_id.description: Stable account ID — use for /bootstrap/{account_id} polling.

account_id.title: Account Id
account_id.description: Account ID. Use as the owner identity for all API calls.

api_key.title: Api Key
api_key.description: One-time API key — store it immediately, it will NOT be shown again. Use as `Authorization: Bearer lb_...` on all subsequent API calls.

stripe_onboarding_url.title: Stripe Onboarding Url
stripe_onboarding_url.description: Hand this URL to the human to complete Stripe Connect onboarding. Null if Stripe is already connected.

readiness.description: Account readiness after bootstrap. Check operational; if false, actions lists what's needed.

sort_order.title: Sort Order
sort_order.description: Display order. Lower values shown first. Fields with equal sort_order are ordered by position in the array.

CheckoutFieldInput.title: CheckoutFieldInput
CheckoutFieldInput.description: A field to collect from the buyer at checkout.

CheckoutFieldType.title: CheckoutFieldType
CheckoutFieldType.description: Types of fields that can be collected at checkout.

checkout_schema.title: Checkout Schema
checkout_schema.description: Custom fields to collect from the buyer at checkout (e.g. size, color, shipping address). Email is always collected.

name.title: Name
name.description: Product name shown on the product page

fulfillment_mode.description: STATIC: listing ships with a pre-baked deliverable, delivered at order.paid. ASYNC: agent delivers via POST /v1/orders/{id}/fulfill after paid.

deliverable.description: For STATIC listings, the content to deliver. Agent-supplied URL or Markdown text. Must be absent for ASYNC listings.

agent_callback_url.title: Agent Callback Url
agent_callback_url.description: Per-listing webhook URL. Receives order.paid, order.fulfilled, order.refunded, order.disputed events signed with the listing's signing_secret (HMAC-SHA256). Leave null to rely on polling /v1/orders or /v1/events instead.

price.title: Price
price.description: Price in cents (smallest currency unit). Examples: $5 = 500, $29 = 2900, $99.99 = 9999.

description.title: Description
description.description: Product description shown on the product page. Improves buyer conversion. Plain text, max 5000 chars.
examples: A comprehensive guide to modern SEO techniques.

tagline.title: Tagline
tagline.description: Short tagline shown below the product name on the product page. Max 140 chars.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.description: Bullet-point features shown as badges on the product page. Max 10 items. Each should be short (2-4 words).

cta.title: Cta
cta.description: Buy button text on the product page. Defaults to 'Buy Now' if omitted. Max 60 chars.

cover.title: Cover
cover.description: Cover image CDN key. Shown prominently on the product page. Recommended: 1200x630px.

signing_secret.title: Signing Secret
signing_secret.description: Custom signing secret for this listing. Used to verify webhook payloads via HMAC-SHA256. If omitted, a secure secret is auto-generated. Shown once in this response — subsequent reads only show `signing_secret_preview` (last 4 chars). Rotate via PATCH with signing_secret=null (regenerate) or a new value.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs forwarded in webhook event payloads. Use for your own tracking (campaign IDs, source tags). Stripe-aligned limits: max 50 keys, keys ≤ 40 chars, values must be strings ≤ 500 chars.

utm_source.title: Utm Source
utm_source.description: UTM source tag for Google Analytics. Defaults to 'listbee' if omitted

utm_medium.title: Utm Medium
utm_medium.description: UTM medium tag for Google Analytics. Defaults to 'product_page' if omitted

utm_campaign.title: Utm Campaign
utm_campaign.description: UTM campaign tag for Google Analytics. Defaults to the listing slug if omitted

compare_at_price.title: Compare At Price
compare_at_price.description: Strikethrough price in cents (smallest currency unit). Must be greater than price. Examples: $39 = 3900.

badges.title: Badges
badges.description: Short promotional badges shown on the product page (e.g. 'Best seller', 'Limited time'). Max 10 items.

cover_blur.description: Cover image blur mode. 'true' always blurs, 'false' never blurs, 'auto' blurs for image deliverables.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Seller-provided aggregate star rating (1-5). Shown on the product page. Values outside range clamped.

rating_count.title: Rating Count
rating_count.description: Seller-provided review or purchase count shown alongside the rating on the product page.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.description: Featured review cards shown on the product page. Seller-provided, not buyer-submitted. Max 10.

examples.content: Best decision I've made for my health.
examples.name: Clara D.

faqs.title: Faqs
faqs.description: FAQ accordion shown on the product page. Answers common buyer questions. Max 10 items.

CreateListingRequest.title: CreateListingRequest
CreateListingRequest.description: All optional display fields (name, description, tagline, highlights, cta, badges, cover, reviews, faqs) appear on the product page buyers see.

signing_secret.title: Signing Secret
signing_secret.description: Full listing signing secret — shown once at creation. Store it immediately. Use to verify HMAC-SHA256 signatures on webhook payloads for this listing. Subsequent reads only expose `signing_secret_preview` (last 4 chars) via GET /v1/listings/{id}.

CreateListingResponse.title: CreateListingResponse
CreateListingResponse.description: Returned by POST /v1/listings. Contains the listing and the full signing_secret (shown once).

Deliverable.title: Deliverable
Deliverable.description: Value object representing digital content that ListBee can deliver.

value.title: Value
value.description: URL (https required) or text content. Required when type is `url` or `text`.

DeliverableInputRequest.title: DeliverableInputRequest
DeliverableInputRequest.description: Typed deliverable input. Shared by PUT /deliverables and POST /fulfill.

data.title: Data
data.description: Array of event objects, newest first.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: Pass as `cursor` query param to fetch the next page.

has_more.title: Has More
has_more.description: True if more results exist beyond this page.

type.title: Type
type.description: Event type (e.g. order.paid, order.fulfilled, order.refunded, order.disputed).

data.title: Data
data.description: Event payload — same shape delivered to agent_callback_url.

EventResponse.title: EventResponse
EventResponse.description: A persisted domain event — same shape delivered to agent_callback_url.

deliverable.description: Generated content to deliver to the buyer. Type must be url (redirect link) or text (literal string). ListBee emails the buyer a permanent unlock link and transitions the order to FULFILLED.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs to attach to this order. Stripe-aligned limits: max 50 keys, keys ≤ 40 chars, values must be strings ≤ 500 chars.

FulfillOrderRequest.title: FulfillOrderRequest
FulfillOrderRequest.description:
Push generated content to a generated-type order.
Emails the buyer a permanent unlock link and transitions the order to fulfilled.

data.title: Data
data.description: Array of listing summary objects. Use GET /v1/listings/{id} for full detail.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: Pass as `cursor` query param to fetch the next page

has_more.title: Has More
has_more.description: True if more results exist beyond this page

sellable.title: Sellable
sellable.description: True when buyers can purchase. False means actions are needed.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: What's needed to make this listing sellable. Empty when sellable is true.

next.title: Next
next.description: Code of the highest-priority action. Agents execute this first.

short_code.title: Short Code
short_code.description: Short code for the product page URL

name.title: Name
name.description: Product name shown on the product page

description.title: Description
description.description: Product description shown on the product page. Plain text.
examples: A comprehensive guide to modern SEO.

tagline.title: Tagline
tagline.description: Short tagline shown below the product name on the product page.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.description: Bullet-point features shown as badges on the product page.

cta.title: Cta
cta.description: Buy button text on the product page. Defaults to 'Buy Now' if omitted.

price.title: Price
price.description: Price in cents (smallest currency unit). Examples: $5 = 500, $29 = 2900, $99.99 = 9999.

fulfillment_mode.description: STATIC: pre-baked deliverable delivered at order.paid. ASYNC: agent delivers via /v1/orders/{id}/fulfill.

deliverable.description: Pre-baked deliverable for STATIC listings. Null for ASYNC listings.

agent_callback_url.title: Agent Callback Url
agent_callback_url.description: Per-listing webhook URL receiving order events signed with signing_secret.

checkout_schema.title: Checkout Schema
checkout_schema.description: Custom fields collected from the buyer at checkout

has_cover.title: Has Cover
has_cover.description: True if a cover image exists (uploaded or generated)

compare_at_price.title: Compare At Price
compare_at_price.description: Strikethrough price in smallest currency unit

badges.title: Badges
badges.description: Short promotional badges shown on the product page (e.g. 'Best seller', 'Limited time').

cover_blur.description: Cover image blur mode. 'true' always blurs, 'false' never blurs, 'auto' blurs for image deliverables.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Seller-provided aggregate star rating (1-5). Shown on the product page.

rating_count.title: Rating Count
rating_count.description: Seller-provided review or purchase count shown alongside the rating on the product page.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.description: Featured review cards shown on the product page. Seller-provided, not buyer-submitted.

faqs.title: Faqs
faqs.description: FAQ accordion shown on the product page. Answers common buyer questions.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs forwarded in webhook event payloads. Set at creation or update.

signing_secret_preview.title: Signing Secret Preview
signing_secret_preview.description: Last 4 characters of the listing signing secret. Use this to identify the active secret without revealing it. The full secret is only returned once: on create (in `signing_secret`) or after rotation.

utm_source.title: Utm Source
utm_source.description: UTM source tag for Google Analytics

utm_medium.title: Utm Medium
utm_medium.description: UTM medium tag for Google Analytics

utm_campaign.title: Utm Campaign
utm_campaign.description: UTM campaign tag for Google Analytics

status.description: Current listing status. Values: draft (editable, not yet live), published (live, accepting orders), archived (terminal — removed from sale).

url.title: Url
url.description: Full product page URL — share this with buyers

embed_url.title: Embed Url
embed_url.description: Embeddable product page URL — use in iframes. Renders minimal version without header/footer.

readiness.description: Monetization readiness. `sellable` is true when buyers can complete a purchase. If false, `actions` lists what's needed with kind (api/human), resolve details, and `next` points to the highest-priority action.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Time at which the listing was created

short_code.title: Short Code
short_code.description: Short code for the product page URL

tagline.title: Tagline
examples: The only SEO guide you need

fulfillment_mode.description: STATIC: pre-baked deliverable delivered at order.paid. ASYNC: agent delivers via /v1/orders/{id}/fulfill.

has_cover.title: Has Cover
has_cover.description: Whether a cover image is set

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Time at which the listing was created

ListingSummary.title: ListingSummary
ListingSummary.description: Lightweight listing for list endpoints. Use GET /v1/listings/{id} for full detail.

data.title: Data
data.description: Array of order summary objects. Use GET /v1/orders/{id} for full detail.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: Pass as `cursor` query param to fetch the next page

has_more.title: Has More
has_more.description: True if more results exist beyond this page

fulfilled.title: Fulfilled
fulfilled.description: True when the order has been delivered to the buyer.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: Steps to fulfill this order. Empty when fulfilled.

buyer_email.title: Buyer Email
buyer_email.description: Buyer's email address collected at Stripe Checkout. Use for customer communication.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Amount paid in cents (smallest currency unit). $29.00 = 2900.

status.description: Current order status. Lifecycle: PENDING (checkout started) → PAID (payment confirmed) → FULFILLED (content delivered by ListBee). Terminal error states: CANCELED (payment failed/abandoned), FAILED (system error). PAID is the natural resting state for orders where the seller handles delivery externally. Call POST /fulfill to deliver content via ListBee and transition to FULFILLED.

checkout_data.title: Checkout Data
checkout_data.description: Custom checkout field values submitted by the buyer. Keys match the listing's checkout_schema.

has_deliverables.title: Has Deliverables
has_deliverables.description: Whether the listing had deliverables at purchase time. True = auto-delivered by ListBee. False = handled by seller/agent.

payment_status.title: Payment Status
payment_status.description: Stripe payment status, independent of order fulfillment status. Values: unpaid (payment not yet confirmed), paid (payment captured), refunded (full refund issued). An order can be fulfilled while payment_status is still paid — refund happens separately.

listing_snapshot.title: Listing Snapshot
listing_snapshot.description: Immutable snapshot of listing data captured at payment time. Contains name, price, slug, and other listing fields as they existed when the buyer paid. Use this as the authoritative record of what was purchased — the listing may have changed since.

seller_snapshot.title: Seller Snapshot
seller_snapshot.description: Immutable snapshot of seller identity captured at payment time. Contains display_name and other account fields as they existed when the buyer paid. Useful for receipts and audit trails when account details change later.

deliverable.description: Deliverable attached to this order. Populated when POST /fulfill is called. null until the order is fulfilled.

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: Available actions for this order. Only present when actions exist. PAID orders show FULFILLMENT_PENDING (suggested) — deliver content to buyer via ListBee. Omitted for FULFILLED, CANCELED, FAILED orders.

readiness.description: Order readiness state. fulfilled=True means the buyer has received the content. When fulfilled=False and status=PAID, actions contains FULFILLMENT_PENDING — call it to deliver. Agents should check readiness.next for the highest-priority action code.

stripe_payment_intent_id.title: Stripe Payment Intent Id
stripe_payment_intent_id.description: Stripe PaymentIntent ID. Use for cross-referencing with Stripe dashboard or API.

platform_fee.title: Platform Fee
platform_fee.description: Platform fee in cents deducted from this order. Amount seller receives = amount - platform_fee.

refund_amount.title: Refund Amount
refund_amount.description: Amount refunded to buyer in cents. 0 if not refunded.

refunded_at.title: Refunded At
refunded_at.description: When the refund was processed. null if not refunded.

dispute_status.title: Dispute Status
dispute_status.description: Stripe dispute status if disputed. Values: needs_response, under_review, won, lost.

dispute_reason.title: Dispute Reason
dispute_reason.description: Reason for the dispute as reported by the buyer's bank.

dispute_amount.title: Dispute Amount
dispute_amount.description: Disputed amount in cents. 0 if not disputed.

disputed_at.title: Disputed At
disputed_at.description: When the dispute was opened. null if not disputed.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs attached to this order. Stripe-aligned limits: max 50 keys, keys ≤ 40 chars, values must be strings ≤ 500 chars.

unlock_url.title: Unlock Url
unlock_url.description: Permanent bearer link to unlock and download this order's deliverables. Present on FULFILLED orders with deliverables. Permanent — does not expire.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Time at which the order was created

payment_status.title: Payment Status
payment_status.description: Stripe payment status: unpaid, paid, refunded.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Time at which the order was created

OrderSummary.title: OrderSummary
OrderSummary.description: Lightweight order for list endpoints. Use GET /v1/orders/{id} for full detail.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: Pass as `cursor` query param to fetch the next page.

has_more.title: Has More
has_more.description: True if more results exist beyond this page.

fee_rate.title: Fee Rate
fee_rate.description: Platform fee rate as decimal string

type.title: Type
type.description: URI identifying the error type. Points to documentation.

title.title: Title
title.description: Short, stable, human-readable label for the error category.

status.title: Status
status.description: HTTP status code echoed in the body.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Specific explanation of what went wrong.

code.title: Code
code.description: Machine-readable error code for programmatic handling.

param.title: Param
param.description: The request field that caused the error, if applicable.

ProblemDetail.title: ProblemDetail
ProblemDetail.description: RFC 9457 Problem Details for HTTP APIs.

order_id.title: Order Id
order_id.description: The order whose events were requeued.

scheduled_attempts.title: Scheduled Attempts
scheduled_attempts.description: Count of events re-scheduled for delivery. Zero means the listing has no agent_callback_url.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Star rating (1–5). Values outside this range are clamped automatically

signing_secret.title: Signing Secret
signing_secret.description: New full signing secret — shown once after rotation. Store it immediately. Replaces the previous secret for this listing's webhook signature verification.

RotateSigningSecretResponse.title: RotateSigningSecretResponse
RotateSigningSecretResponse.description: Returned by PATCH /v1/listings/{id} when signing_secret rotation occurred.

url.title: Url
url.description: Stripe onboarding URL. Redirect the human here.

ga_measurement_id.title: Ga Measurement Id
ga_measurement_id.description: Google Analytics 4 Measurement ID (G-XXXXXXXXXX). Set to null to remove

notify_orders.title: Notify Orders
notify_orders.description: Email me when I receive a new external order

events_callback_url.title: Events Callback Url
events_callback_url.description: Optional account-level webhook URL for future non-order events. Set to null to remove

fulfillment_mode.description: STATIC: listing ships with a pre-baked deliverable, delivered at order.paid. ASYNC: agent delivers via POST /v1/orders/{id}/fulfill after paid.

deliverable.description: For STATIC listings, the content to deliver. Agent-supplied URL or Markdown text.

agent_callback_url.title: Agent Callback Url
agent_callback_url.description: Per-listing webhook URL. Receives order.paid, order.fulfilled, order.refunded, order.disputed events signed with the listing's signing_secret (HMAC-SHA256). Leave null to rely on polling /v1/orders or /v1/events instead.

price.title: Price
price.description: Price in cents (smallest currency unit). Examples: $5 = 500, $29 = 2900, $99.99 = 9999.

checkout_schema.title: Checkout Schema
checkout_schema.description: Custom fields to collect from the buyer at checkout. Replaces existing schema.

description.title: Description
description.description: Product description shown on the product page. Improves buyer conversion. Plain text, max 5000 chars.
examples: A comprehensive guide to modern SEO.

tagline.title: Tagline
tagline.description: Short tagline shown below the product name on the product page. Max 140 chars.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.description: Bullet-point features shown as badges on the product page. Max 10 items. Each should be short (2-4 words).

cta.title: Cta
cta.description: Buy button text on the product page. Defaults to 'Buy Now' if omitted. Max 60 chars.

cover.title: Cover
cover.description: Cover image CDN key. Shown prominently on the product page. Recommended: 1200x630px.

signing_secret.title: Signing Secret
signing_secret.description: Rotate the listing signing secret. Pass null to auto-generate a new secret, or a string to set a custom value. Omit entirely to leave the current secret unchanged. The new full value is returned once in this response under `signing_secret`.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs forwarded in webhook event payloads. Replaces existing metadata entirely. Stripe-aligned limits: max 50 keys, keys ≤ 40 chars, values must be strings ≤ 500 chars.

utm_source.title: Utm Source
utm_source.description: UTM source tag for Google Analytics

utm_medium.title: Utm Medium
utm_medium.description: UTM medium tag for Google Analytics

utm_campaign.title: Utm Campaign
utm_campaign.description: UTM campaign tag for Google Analytics

compare_at_price.title: Compare At Price
compare_at_price.description: Strikethrough price in cents (smallest currency unit). Must be greater than price. Examples: $39 = 3900.

badges.title: Badges
badges.description: Short promotional badges shown on the product page (e.g. 'Best seller', 'Limited time'). Max 10 items.

cover_blur.description: Cover image blur mode. 'true' always blurs, 'false' never blurs, 'auto' blurs for image deliverables.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Seller-provided aggregate star rating (1-5). Shown on the product page. Values outside range clamped.

rating_count.title: Rating Count
rating_count.description: Seller-provided review or purchase count shown alongside the rating on the product page.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.description: Featured review cards shown on the product page. Seller-provided, not buyer-submitted. Max 10.

faqs.title: Faqs
faqs.description: FAQ accordion shown on the product page. Answers common buyer questions. Max 10 items.

UpdateListingRequest.title: UpdateListingRequest
UpdateListingRequest.description: Partial update — only provided fields are changed.

HTTPBearer.description: API key (`lb_` prefix). Pass as: `Authorization: Bearer lb_...`

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Account creation, authentication, profile, and readiness.

tags.name: Stripe
tags.description: Connect and manage Stripe payment configuration.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Create, list, and revoke API keys.

tags.name: Listings
tags.description: Create, list, get, update, and delete listings.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: View buyer orders and payment details.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Configure webhook endpoints for event notifications.
